attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WCFP.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT,
 WCFP.WPR_LEAD_ORGANIZATION_NAME,
 WCFP.WILDCARD_1_CMT,
 WCFP.WILDCARD_2_CMT,
 WCFP.WILDCARD_3_CMT,
 WCFP.WILDCARD_4_CMT,
 WCFP.TOTAL_BUDGET_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.TOTAL_CAPITAL_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.TOTAL_EXPENSE_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.TOTAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.TOTAL_SPENT_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.TOTAL_APPROVED_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.RESERVED_PROPERTY_FLG,
 WCFP.REQUESTED_CAPITAL_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.PROJECT_TYPE_CD,
 WCFP.PROJECT_REASON_TYPE_CD,
 WCFP.PROJECT_COST_RANGE_DESCR,
 WCFP.PROJECT_MANAGER_NAME,
 WCFP.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD,
 WCFP.PROJECT_STATUS_CD,
 WCFP.PROJECT_DURATION_MONTH_CNT,
 WCFP.PROJECT_DESCR,
 WCFP.PRIORITY_LEVEL_INT,
 WCFP.MANUFACTURING_PLANT_CD,
 WCFP.PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED_CD,
 WCFP.OTHER_CONTACT_NAME,
 WCFP.ORIGINAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.FINANCE_REGION_CD,
 WCFP.FACILITY_TYPE_CD,
 WCFP.ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_USD_AMT,
 WCFP.ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_NUM,
 WCFP.DIRECTOR_NAME,
 WCFP.COST_TYPE_DESCR,
 WCFP.CONTROLLER_REVIEWER_NAME,
 WCFP.CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DT,
 WCFP.CLIENT_REVIEWER_NAME,
 WCFP.CLIENT_REVIEW_DT,
 WCFP.CIP_PROJECT_ID,
 WCFP.CIP_PROJECT_FLG,
 WCFP.CERTAINTY_LEVEL_INT,
 WCFP.BDLG_OWNERSHP_STATUS_DESCR,
 WCFP.ALLOC_SPACE_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,
 WCFP.PROJECT_SIZE_AREA_AMT,
 WCFP.PROJ_SIZE_AREA_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,
 WCFP.ALLOCATED_SPACE_QTY,
 WCFP.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_CREATION_DTM,
 WCFP.FUTURE_PROJECT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
 WCFP.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_DT,
 WCFP.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_FLG,
 WCFP.CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_CD,
 WCFP.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_BIZ_JSTF_DESCR,
 WCFP.CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_NAME,
 WCFP.PROJECT_AREA_TYPE_NAME,
 WCFP.SPACE_TYPE_CD,
 WCFP.PRJ_PRIORITY_WEIGHTING_FCTR_RT,
 WCFP.PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 WCFP.PROJECT_CD,
 WCFP.CRTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
 WCFP.LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 WCFP.BUILDING_ID,
 WCFP.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
 WCFP.CAM_PLNNR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 WCFP.ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
 WCFP.DCM_PRJ_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 WCFP.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
 WCFP.EST_END_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.EST_END_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.EST_END_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.EST_END_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.EST_START_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.EST_START_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.EST_START_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.EST_START_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.FCLTY_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 WCFP.FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.FIN_ANLYST_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 WCFP.GLBL_CAM_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 WCFP.EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 WCFP.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
 WCFP.RL_EST_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 WCFP.REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 WCFP.WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_CD,
 WCFP.WPR_COST_COMPANY_CD,
 WCFP.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 WCFP.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 WCFP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 WCFP.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WCFP.START_TV_DT,
 WCFP.END_TV_DT ,
 WCFP.PARENT_PROJECT_DESCR        , 
 WCFP.WPR_REGION_CD  ,
 WCFP.CRITICALITY_LEVEL_INT ,
 WCFP.CIP_CPTLZTN_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT,
 WCFP.CIP_CPTLZTN_FISCAL_YR_NUM_INT   , 
 WCFP.BK_CPTL_FUTURE_ORG_ABBR_NAME  ,
WCFP.PROJECT_LOCATION_STATE_CD,
WCFP.PROJECT_LOCATION_CITY_NAME,
WCFP.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT WCFP
WHERE (WCFP.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT,WCFP.START_TV_DT)
 NOT IN ( SELECT NCFPT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT,NCFPT.START_TV_DT 
            FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV NCFPT )
